subject: CIR.NO.245- Evening Schedule for 23rd November 2025 (Classes IX ? XII)
body:
[image: unnamed.png]
*           SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

          Scheme No. 54, A B Road, INDORE (MP) 452010

                    CBSE School No. : 50056,   CBSE Affiliation No.1030023
                  E-mail: sai@sathyasaiindore.com <sai@sathyasaiindore.com>
     Ph: 0731-2553023

*CIR**.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/245
             * *Date: 21st November, 2025*



Dear Parents



Sai Ram!



23rd November is a sacred day for all Sai devotees, a time when all unite
to celebrate the Divine Presence and the timeless teachings of our Beloved
Sri Sathya Sai Baba. This year holds even greater significance, as we mark
the blessed Centenary Year, making the celebration all the more meaningful
and momentous.



*Kindly be informed that the children of class IX ? XII must attend the
evening programme on Sunday, 23rd November, 2025, in proper uniform with
Blazers to participate in the Centenary birthday festivities and honour His
message of love, service and unity. The reporting time will be 05:00 p.m.
and departure will be at 09:00 p.m. after dinner. *

Buses will ply for pick up and drop.

*The bus routes have been attached herewith. Please contact Mr. Jitu Bhai
Patel (9826095139) for any query regarding transport.*



Looking forward to your cooperation.



With Best Regards









Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal

Email ? *principal@sathyasaiindore.com <principal@sathyasaiindore.com>*

Website ? *www.sathyasaiindore.com <http://www.sathyasaiindore.com/>*
